'''thazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nudgingly|nudgingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-zh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nudgingly|nudgingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thazhate|thazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thazhatesher|thazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazhatesherĂ«m|thazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thazhatero|thazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thazhateshĂ«|thazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazhateshĂ«m|thazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithazhatero|gokithazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithazhateshĂ«|gokithazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithazhateshĂ«m|gokithazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothazhankerom|gothazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothazhankeshĂ«|gothazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothazhankeshĂ«m|gothazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothazhankeya|gothazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thazhaterom|thazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazhatemu|thazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thazhateya|thazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithazhaterom|gokithazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithazhatemu|gokithazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithazhateya|gokithazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thazhazhate|thazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thazhazhatesher|thazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazhazhatesherĂ«m|thazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thazhazhatero|thazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thazhazhateshĂ«|thazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazhazhateshĂ«m|thazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithazhazhatero|gokithazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithazhazhateshĂ«|gokithazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithazhazhateshĂ«m|gokithazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothazhazhankerom|gothazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothazhazhankeshĂ«|gothazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothazhazhankeshĂ«m|gothazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothazhazhankeya|gothazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thazhazhaterom|thazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazhazhatemu|thazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thazhazhateya|thazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithazhazhaterom|gokithazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithazhazhatemu|gokithazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithazhazhateya|gokithazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠzhĂŠte|thĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠzhĂŠtesher|thĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠzhĂŠtero|thĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokithĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠzhĂŠterom|thĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠzhĂŠtemu|thĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠzhĂŠteya|thĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokithĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokithĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafzhafte|thafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafzhaftesher|thafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafzhaftesherĂ«m|thafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafzhaftero|thafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafzhafteshĂ«|thafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafzhafteshĂ«m|thafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafzhaftero|gokithafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafzhafteshĂ«|gokithafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafzhafteshĂ«m|gokithafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafzhafnkerom|gothafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafzhafnkeshĂ«|gothafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafzhafnkeshĂ«m|gothafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafzhafnkeya|gothafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafzhafterom|thafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafzhaftemu|thafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafzhafteya|thafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafzhafterom|gokithafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafzhaftemu|gokithafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafzhafteya|gokithafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
